seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with BeeAI + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with BeeAI + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: BeeAI enables building production-ready Agentic RAG agents that autonomously plan retrieval queries, fetch from multiple sources, and synthesize attributed responses. Guardrails are essential to prevent unbounded memory growth, tool injection attacks, and hallucinated outputs in multi-step reasoning flows. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure source faithfulness and query accuracy in high-risk deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with BeeAI
architectureOverview.description:
The Agentic RAG architecture in BeeAI features a central agent with long-term memory that decomposes user queries into sub-queries, dispatches tools for retrieval from vector stores and knowledge bases, and synthesizes responses with citations. Tools handle semantic search, reranking, and multi-source aggregation while the agent maintains conversation state across turns. Observability is built-in via event hooks for monitoring planning, retrieval, and generation steps.

Key components include the BeeAI Agent with MemoryManager for state persistence, ToolRegistry for retrieval tools, and Granite LLM for reasoning. The agent loop processes events like 'plan_query', 'retrieve_docs', 'synthesize_response', enabling autonomous iteration until convergence. This creates powerful but complex systems prone to drift without verification.

risks.name: Unbounded Memory Growth
risks.description: Agent memory accumulates all conversation history and retrieved docs without pruning, causing OOM errors in long sessions
risks.mitigation: Vex monitors memory usage per session and enforces relevance-based truncation

risks.name: Source Attribution Drift
risks.description: Agent synthesizes responses that lose connection to retrieved sources, leading to hallucinated citations
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies citation faithfulness against raw retrieved chunks

risks.name: Query Planning Inaccuracy
risks.description: Agent generates suboptimal sub-queries that miss relevant information or retrieve noise
risks.mitigation: Vex scores query relevance against final answer coverage

risks.name: Tool Injection via Malicious Input
risks.description: Adversarial queries exploit tool validation gaps to execute unintended retrieval patterns
risks.mitigation: Vex sanitizes tool inputs and validates query intent

implementation.title: Basic Agentic RAG Agent Setup
implementation.description: Initialize BeeAI agent with retrieval tools and memory for multi-step RAG
implementation.code:
from beeai import Agent, MemoryManager
from beeai.tools import VectorSearchTool, KnowledgeBaseTool

agent = Agent(
    name="rag-agent",
    llm="granite-3b",
    memory=MemoryManager(max_history=50),
    tools=[
        VectorSearchTool(index_name="docs"),
        KnowledgeBaseTool(sources=["wiki", "manuals"])
    ]
)

@agent.on('query')
def handle_query(ctx):
    plan = agent.plan_query(ctx.user_input)
    docs = agent.execute_tools(plan)
    response = agent.synthesize(plan, docs)
    return response

implementation.description: Custom tool that aggregates and reranks results from multiple retrieval sources

implementation.description: Autonomous planning and execution loop with convergence criteria

implementation.description: Generate final response with source attribution and confidence scores

vexIntegration.title: Register Vex Event Listener
vexIntegration.description: Hook Vex into BeeAI agent events for runtime verification
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import Vex
from beeai import Agent

vex = Vex(api_key="your-vex-key")

@vex.guardrail('agentic-rag')
def verify_agent_step(ctx):
    return {
        'memory_size': len(ctx['memory']),
        'sources': ctx['sources'],
        'response': ctx['response'],
        'citations': ctx.get('citations', [])
    }

# Register with BeeAI agent
agent.add_event_listener('after_execute', vex.verify)
agent.add_event_listener('before_tool_call', vex.sanitize_input)
agent.add_event_listener('after_synthesis', verify_agent_step)

vexIntegration.description: Verify citations match retrieved source content

vexIntegration.title: Memory Growth Guardrail
vexIntegration.description: Prevent unbounded memory accumulation with automatic pruning

cta.heading: Secure Your BeeAI Agentic RAG
cta.description: Deploy Vex guardrails today to eliminate hallucination risks and ensure production reliability.
